visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit warehouse store setting, likely a Costco. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a cream-colored knit cardigan over a black and white striped top and a long white lace skirt, stands next to a tall metal shelving unit. The unit is stocked with various types of green ferns, each enclosed in a transparent plastic hanging box. She smiles brightly at the camera and gestures towards the plants with her right hand. (2) The camera shifts to a series of close-up shots of the ferns. We see different leaf shapes and shades of green, including Bird's Nest ferns and Staghorn ferns, all neatly packaged in their clear cases with wooden backings. A male hand intermittently enters the frame to point at specific plants or the price tag of $399. The warehouse background remains visible, showing high industrial ceilings and orange steel racking typical of a large retail warehouse. (3) The scene returns to a medium shot of the woman. She continues to interact with the products, pointing at the plants and the signage while maintaining expressive facial movements as if engaged in a lively conversation. She gives a thumbs-up to the camera. The background shows other shoppers and the vast aisle of the store under bright overhead industrial lighting. (4) In the final phase, the woman picks up one of the fern boxes, holding it with both hands to show it to the camera. She looks down at the plant with a curious expression and then smiles warmly back at the viewer. A colorful graphic with Chinese text appears near the bottom of the screen as she poses with the product.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Subtitle]: 阿寶我們來買這個. [Variety]: 399元 掛門上超好看 上板蕨類. (3) [Subtitle]: 399元 這很方便. (4) [Subtitle]: 你只需要兩三天澆一次. [Variety]: 懶. (5) [Subtitle]: 你會忘記. (6) [Subtitle]: 一個月施一次肥. (7) [Subtitle]: 還要施肥. (8) [Subtitle]: 很棒哎 他們說蕨類植物. [Variety]: 具有招財聚氣的功效. (9) [Subtitle]: 真的嗎 可是我買了. (10) [Subtitle]: 我就虧399元 確定有招財. (11) [Subtitle]: 不虧 你拿你的399. (12) [Subtitle]: 換來了一個鮮活的生命. (13) [Subtitle]: 哇 可是很漂亮哎. (14) [Subtitle]: 對呀 它有各種的哦. (15) [Subtitle]: 看起來很好吃. (16) [Subtitle]: 看起來很漂亮 看起來很漂亮. (17) [Subtitle]: 所以這個是直接掛在大門上嗎. (18) [Subtitle]: 應該是掛在任何你想掛的地方. (19) [Subtitle]: 你要掛房門也可以啊. (20) [Subtitle]: 哇~ 就是. (21) [Subtitle]: 表示你是一個森林girl. (22) [Subtitle]: 可是我覺得它400塊. (23) [Subtitle]: 可以買到那麼漂亮的蕨類. (24) [Subtitle]: 真的很值得. (25) [Subtitle]: 雖然一定去花市買更便宜啊. (26) [Subtitle]: 可是這邊買就很方便啊. (27) [Subtitle]: 那死了可以退貨嗎. (28) [Subtitle]: 哈哈哈哈. (29) [Subtitle]: 開玩笑開玩笑 要幫他買保險. (30) [Subtitle]: 你看那麼認真 做什麼幹嘛. (31) [Subtitle]: 幹嘛. (32) [Subtitle]: 你只要掛著就好了. (33) [Subtitle]: 掛著他就掛了... (34) [Subtitle]: 你還要養他. (35) [Variety]: 招財進寶.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 male cameraman (hand visible), 2 shoppers in background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main woman has long dark hair and is wearing a cream-colored knit cardigan and a long white lace skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: High-ceilinged warehouse store interior with orange industrial steel shelving units filled with various household and garden goods.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a female voice speaking in an energetic, conversational tone over a bright, mid-tempo acoustic pop background track featuring strummed guitar and light percussion. The music has a clear major-key, happy vibe. (2) A sharp comedic sound effect, resembling an alert chime or a cartoon megaphone sound, triggers as the female voice emphasizes the 'wealth-attracting' qualities of the plants. Her pitch rises excitedly during this segment. (3) A male voice joins the conversation, sounding teased and slightly cynical but friendly. The two voices overlap with the continuous background music. The male's laughter is heard briefly, punctuating a joke about the plants' price and mortality. (4) The warehouse environment is audible only as a very faint, low-frequency hum, ensuring high vocal clarity throughout. As the video concludes, the female speaker maintains her lively narrative pace, and the music track loops consistently until the recording stops.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to showcase a specific lifestyle product found at Costco (wall-mounted ferns) while entertaining the audience through a humorous, relatabe shopping dialogue. It highlights the aesthetic value and convenience of the plants, playfully touching on superstitious benefits to drive engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: While featuring Costco prominently, the tone is a personal vlog review rather than a formal sponsorship.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a classic 'shopping find' vlog format, leveraging the popularity of Costco to attract viewers interested in home decor and lifestyle bargains.
